content.question: What causal mechanism (if any) directly links school closure to acceleration of village depopulation, versus school closure being a symptom of pre-existing out-migration and fertility decline?
content.reduction_path: Conduct matched longitudinal study comparing villages with and without school closures, controlling for pre-closure migration trends, employment proximity, and family-structure demography; measure population retention before and after closure separately for in-migrants, natural increase, and within-village-born cohorts
